description: Celebrate your musical journey over the year with our vibrant, engaging email campaign template. Perfect for recapping your year in music, this template is ideal for both music streaming services and individual music lovers. It allows you to share your top tunes, favorite artists, and significant milestones from 2021, all wrapped in a colourful, eye-catching design. Whether you've discovered new genres or revisited old favorites, this template is a fantastic way to review your annual musical adventure. Ideal for a New Year celebration or annual review, it encourages reflection on a year's worth of rhythm and melody. Connect with fellow music enthusiasts and share your musical highlights of the year with this dynamic, engaging email campaign template.
short_description: Celebrate your musical journey with this vibrant email campaign template. Perfect for music streaming services and music lovers to recap 2021's top tunes, favorite artists, and milestones. Ideal for New Year or annual music reviews. Share your musical highlights in a colourful, engaging design.

designer.description: Hi, I'm Betina, a digital designer currently working across emails, digital campaigns and social media.
